title: USMLE 2020 Bulletin of Information - Step 2 CS Format
citation: Federation of State Medical Boards and National Board of Medical Examiners. 2020 Bulletin of Information. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Historical description of Step 2 CS format, timing, standardized-patient use, subcomponents, and scoring requirements.
Architecture inspiration for a station-based clinical skills exam simulator.
claims_supported: Step 2 CS used 12 patient cases with 15 minutes for each encounter plus 10 minutes for the patient note.
Step 2 CS used standardized patients to assess information gathering, physical examination, and communication of findings.
Step 2 CS had three subcomponents: Communication and Interpersonal Skills, Integrated Clinical Encounter, and Spoken English Proficiency.
Step 2 CS required passing all three subcomponents in one administration.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR is equivalent to Step 2 CS.
That OpenClinXR can be used for licensure decisions.
That historical Step 2 CS exam content can be reproduced.
